text.title: gateway-fallback-chain Decision Tree
text.summary: Choose between hosted gateway, self-hosted proxy, and direct SDK with app-level fallback.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workload depend on a vendor-specific feature (prompt caching, Batch API, fine-tuned model)?

branch.conclusion: Call the vendor SDK directly; implement the fallback chain in application code.

branch.question: Is the workload subject to data-residency or strict compliance (EU healthcare, defense, EUR/UK BSA)?

branch.conclusion: Self-host LiteLLM/Kong AI Gateway inside the compliance boundary, OR call vendor SDK direct with app-level fallback.

branch.question: Is the workload production with an availability SLA above the single-vendor floor?

branch.conclusion: Use a hosted gateway (OpenRouter, Portkey) with a cross-provider chain of >=2 providers.
Direct SDK is fine; gateway adds latency for no payoff in low-SLA environments.

text.example: q-vendor-feature → branch(false) → q-compliance → branch(false) → q-availability-need → branch(true) → conclusion(r1-cross-provider-fallback).
